goal: Verify both ROM paths consume one identical closure bundle manifest
metrics: manifest identity; artifact presence; provenance completeness
acceptance_rule: Both paths read the same bundle version and no artifact is missing

goal: Prove the current solver can replay the imported Salt closure bundle without reopening the baseline predictive workflow
metrics: mdot; segment bulk temperatures; branch UA'; residual usage
acceptance_rule: Replay completes and exposes direct Nu only on left_lower_leg with explicit residual buckets

cases: Salt 2 Val|Salt 2 Jin|Salt 2 Kirst|Salt 3 Jin|Salt 3 Kirst|Salt 4 Jin|Salt 4 Kirst
goal: Check the shared bundle across the defended seven-case Salt training set
metrics: mdot; segment bulk temperatures; branch UA'; branch HTC; case-level residual fractions
acceptance_rule: All seven cases run with the same closure authority boundary and no defended feature K_eff appears

goal: Prove the clean Salt ROM skeleton can consume the same bundle and reproduce the same closure bookkeeping
metrics: mdot; seven-element temperature profile; residual usage
acceptance_rule: The clean ROM runs with the same bundle manifest and preserves the same blocked-vs-admitted boundary

cases: Salt 2 Val|Salt 2 Jin|Salt 2 Kirst|Salt 3 Jin|Salt 3 Kirst|Salt 4 Jin|Salt 4 Kirst
goal: Check the clean ROM across the full defended Salt replay set
metrics: mdot; segment bulk temperatures; branch UA'; optional left_lower_leg direct Nu; residual fractions
acceptance_rule: All seven cases run and the clean ROM never uses direct Nu outside left_lower_leg or outside the defended range

cases: Salt 2 Val|Salt 4 Jin minimum; expand to all seven when ready
goal: Compare the two paths under the same imported closure bundle
metrics: case-level mdot delta; segment temperature deltas; branch UA' deltas; residual bucket deltas
acceptance_rule: Cross-path differences are reported explicitly and traced to solver structure rather than silent closure drift

goal: Ensure neither ROM path overclaims blocked closures
metrics: feature closure usage; direct Nu branch usage; cooler BC mode; Water usage
acceptance_rule: No defended feature K_eff, no live cooler-side h, and no Water collapse appear in first-pass outputs

goal: Reuse the current solver contract tests as a floor before adding imported-bundle replay features
acceptance_rule: Existing tests still pass before the new replay/import lane is promoted
